description: Full normalization without gamma/beta: tilize, mean, center, var, rsqrt, normalize, untilize

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, prepare_reduce_scaler for cb_scaler, generate_bcast_unary_scalar for cb_eps, 32 sticks per tile-row pushed as Wt pages

10-phase layernorm: tilize(layernorm_compute_utils), reduce_row(mean with 1/W post_reduce_op), sub_COL(center), square(WaitUpfrontNoPop), reduce_row(var), add_SCALAR+rsqrt, mul_COL(normalize), untilize. Persistent eps/scaler CBs. Dynamic affine routing via constexpr.
Re-wrote reader after linter revert. TensorAccessor for all tensors, prepare_reduce_scaler, generate_bcast_unary_scalar for eps, zero_faces+noc_read for gamma/beta, 32 sticks per tile-row.

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/Wt(NoPop+PopAtEnd) c2:1/persist c3:1/1 c4:Wt/Wt(NoPop+PopAtEnd) c5:Wt/Wt c6:1/1 c7:1/persist c16:Wt/Wt c24:1/1 c28:Wt/Wt

description: Reader compile fail: wrong include path for TensorAccessor. The linter already stripped the bad include. TensorAccessor is available via dataflow_api.h. File is already correct now.
evidence: Error: No such file or directory: ttnn/cpp/ttnn/tensor/accessor/tensor_accessor.hpp. Linter removed it.

change: Added include for generate_bcast_scalar.hpp which provides generate_bcast_unary_scalar. Removed bad tensor_accessor.hpp include (already handled by linter). TensorAccessor available via dataflow_api.h.

upstream_fixes: fixed reader include path: removed bad tensor_accessor.hpp, added generate_bcast_scalar.hpp

description: Add gamma multiplication: reader reads gamma RM sticks, compute tilizes gamma once then applies mul<ROW> broadcast in phase 8

cb_summary: c19:Wt/Wt c17:Wt/persist c25:Wt/Wt(phase7->phase8) c16:Wt/Wt(phase8->phase10) All other CBs same as pure_normalize

design_deviations: No code changes needed - gamma support was already implemented in stage 1 via has_gamma compile-time arg
